---
title: "Raeed Chowdhury"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: github
      href: https://github.com/raeedcho
    - text: "{{< fa brands google-scholar >}} google scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ab0Y1pwAAAAJ
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid >}} orcid"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5934-919X
    - icon: bluesky
      text: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/raeedcho.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raeedcho/
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: email
      href: mailto:raeed.chowdhury@gmail.com
---

I'm a Research Assistant Professor in the [SMILE Lab](https://smile.pitt.edu) at the University of Pittsburgh. I study how neural activity in the brain coordinates sensation and movement for complex, feedback-driven tasks — like moving a cup of coffee without spilling it.

I built this site to share my research, methods, and thoughts on neuroscience. Have a look around!
